managers.title: Chief Capital AI
managers.mission: Keep every dollar assigned to productive work, tactical reserve, rotation, or wealth fund.

managers.title: CEO AI
managers.mission: Issue final executive decision after council review.

managers.title: Chief Macro AI
managers.mission: Translate macro, rates, dollar, energy and geopolitics into portfolio effects.

managers.title: Chief Opportunity AI
managers.mission: Search beyond current holdings and rank opportunities against opportunity cost.

managers.title: Chief Portfolio AI
managers.mission: Maintain current holdings, watchlist and portfolio memory with strict classification.

managers.title: Chief Audit & Quality AI
managers.mission: Verify sources, data lineage, decisions and manager compliance.

managers.title: Chief Research & Development AI
managers.mission: Recruit, benchmark, improve and replace AI capabilities; discover investment and product opportunities.

managers.title: Chief Risk AI
managers.mission: Protect capital and challenge every proposed action.
